seoTitle: Sans Souci vs Sapphire — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sans Souci and Sapphire. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sans Souci vs Sapphire: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sans Souci and Sapphire.
heading: Sans Souci vs Sapphire — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sans Souci, New South Wales and Sapphire, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sans Souci has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sapphire (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sans Souci or Sapphire safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sans Souci has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Sapphire scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sans Souci scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Sapphire scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sans Souci or Sapphire?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sans Souci has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
